result.evidence_summary: The PyeongChang Loppet is listed as an official Ski Classics Challengers event on February 21, 2026, at Alpensia Cross-Country Center, with a dedicated event page describing the 10km freestyle mass-start race and festival. A race results platform (race result) has a page for '2026 Pyeongchang Loppet Ski Marathon_SKI CLASSIC' including sections for registration, participants, live timing, and results. No official website or past results found, but these two independent sources from established skiing organizations confirm it as a real upcoming event.
